prompt_adapter_append: render Challenger as a faithful NASA Space Shuttle stack with correct orbiter, external tank, and twin solid rocket boosters
the subject must read as a winged shuttle orbiter attached to a rust-orange external tank flanked by two white solid rocket boosters, not a single cylindrical rocket
space shuttle anatomy must be accurate and recognizable, never a generic rocket or abstract monolith
preserve the orbiter nose, delta-wing body, and booster relationship as recognizable shuttle geometry rather than simplifying them away
if any exhaust or smoke appears, it must emit only from aft booster nozzles or orbiter main engines at the rear, never from the nose, sidewalls, mid-body, or forward joints
steer_keep_traits: winged orbiter plus external tank plus twin boosters
